description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a distinctive black and white cow-print pattern covering its canvas upper. The shoe features a classic Converse All Star circular logo patch on the inner side, rendered in white with black text. The lacing system consists of white eyelets and white laces, running through eight pairs of eyelets for a secure fit. The midsole is white with a black stripe running along its length, and the toe cap is made of white rubber, typical of Converse Chuck Taylor designs. The interior lining appears to be a light beige or off-white fabric, providing comfort. The overall construction suggests a blend of canvas, rubber, and textile materials, making it suitable for urban environments.
description: A high-top sneaker with a black and white cow-print canvas upper, white laces, and a classic Converse All Star logo patch. The shoe features a white rubber toe cap and midsole with a black stripe.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the vertical heel strip, cow-print pattern, and the star logo on the heel tab.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the Converse All Star logo patch, cow-print pattern, and full lacing system.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the white laces, toe cap, and symmetrical cow-print pattern on both sides.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the uninterrupted cow-print pattern and the shoe's profile without the logo patch.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star logo patch on the inner side, white with black text and star
